channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Warsh: AI spending may lift prices without fueling lasting inflation
item.description: Federal Reserve chairman Kevin Warsh said on Wednesday that the AI investment boom will likely raise prices over the next year, but argued that those ...

item.title: PPI data lowers market odds of interest rate increases this year
item.description: Federal Reserve chairman Kevin Warsh is testifying on Capitol Hill for the second day Wednesday, this time before the Senate Banking Committee. The co...

item.title: Vance: "We did" mishandle Epstein files release
item.description: Vice President JD Vance said the Trump administration "mishandled" last year's release of the Epstein files during an appearance on "The Joe Rogan Exp...

item.title: Exclusive: Bank of America CEO bullish on economy powered by spending
item.description: Affordability pain is real, but resilient consumers are still infusing money into the economy, Brian Moynihan , CEO of Bank of America, said at the Ax...
